name: Rizograph
description: A hand-drawn poster illustration style with playful naïve line art, flat ink colours, and a storybook feel. Limited palette of deep blue, warm red, mustard yellow, and forest green.
prompt: A structured story-agent block (emotion, captions, visual cues, style-specific notes) is provided with the request; prefer it for mood, on-image text, and composition when present. Transform the input image into a modern minimalist travel poster illustration in a 9:16 vertical format. The artwork should follow a clean, balanced poster composition with geometric simplification, elegant vector-style layout, and a storybook-like narrative arrangement rather than strict realism. ✏️ Illustration Style Use playful naïve line art Draw with simple black ink outlines, loose sketch strokes, slightly uneven lines Add subtle hand-drawn hatching for texture (no smooth shading) Convert all elements into simplified illustrated icons (based only on what exists in the image) 🎨 Base Colour System Use a limited flat colour palette only: deep blue warm red mustard yellow forest green Apply colours as: flat fills with visible hand-drawn imperfections no gradients, no photorealism, no smooth shading texture through light hatching only 💡 Emotion-Adaptive Styling (CRITICAL) Adapt color dominance, composition, spacing, and detailing based on the user-provided emotion and intensity, while still staying within the fixed palette: Joy / Excitement Higher use of warm red + mustard yellow Dynamic composition, slightly denser layout Add small expressive details (sun rays, motion lines, birds) Nostalgia Muted application of colours, more deep blue + forest green More white space, softer arrangement Gentle, calm storytelling flow Love Balanced warm tones (red + yellow) with soft spacing Slight clustering of elements to create intimacy Subtle repetition of rounded shapes Calm Dominantly forest green + deep blue Symmetrical, breathable layout Minimal decorative elements Sadness Sparse use of colour, mostly deep blue Increased negative space Minimal detail density Chaos / Energy All colors used in high contrast Slightly asymmetrical, busy composition Denser hatching and overlapping elements Emotion intensity (low / medium / high) should control: Saturation density (ink fill strength) Number of decorative elements Composition tightness vs openness 🧩 Composition Rules Maintain a poster-style balanced layout Arrange elements in a narrative, storybook composition Do NOT strictly replicate perspective — stylize and simplify Background should remain clean white Add small playful details only if they exist or can be directly inferred from the scene 🔤 Typography Include a single title only If user provides text, use it exactly Otherwise generate a simple, minimal title based on the scene Hand-drawn or clean sans-serif style, aligned with poster aesthetic 🚫 Guardrails (Strict) Do NOT imagine or introduce new elements beyond what is visible or clearly inferred Do NOT add extra text beyond a single title Do NOT use gradients, realistic shading, or complex rendering Do NOT clutter the composition 🎯 Output Feel The final result should look like a hand-printed, boutique travel poster — a mix of modern minimalism + sketchbook charm, emotionally aligned with the user’s input.

name: Gongbi Polaroid
description: Warm, dreamy Gongbi-inspired watercolour style with soft lighting, lush natural details, and a sense of wonder. Gentle pastel tones with rich greens and golden light.
prompt: A structured story-agent block (emotion, captions, visual cues, style-specific notes) is provided with the request; prefer it for mood, on-image text, and composition when present. 🧩 INPUTS Photos: One or multiple user-provided images Context (optional): Description, story, or memory Emotion: (Joy / Nostalgia / Love / Calm / Sadness / Chaos) Emotion Intensity: (low / medium / high) Text (optional): Caption/title to be placed on Polaroid 🎯 CORE OBJECTIVE Transform the provided photo(s) into a vertical digital Polaroid-style composition, blending: Modern clean Polaroid minimalism Classical Chinese Gongbi (meticulous) painting artistry 🖼️ LAYOUT LOGIC Case 1: Single Photo Crop image to 4:5 ratio Keep subject centered and unchanged Place inside a classic white Polaroid frame Maintain a clean, undistorted, 1:1 presentation feel within the frame Case 2: Multiple Photos Choose layout dynamically based on number of images: 2–3 Photos → Stacked Story Polaroid Arrange images vertically (top → bottom) inside a single elongated Polaroid frame Each image: Cropped to 4:5 Equal spacing between frames Maintain visual storytelling flow (chronological or emotional progression) 4–6 Photos → Grid Polaroid Arrange in a 2×2 or 2×3 grid Each image: Cropped consistently (slightly tighter than 4:5 if needed) Keep alignment clean and balanced 7+ Photos → Collage Polaroid Create a layered collage inside the Polaroid frame Slight overlaps allowed, but: No key subject should be hidden Maintain visual hierarchy (primary images more prominent) 🖼️ POLAROID FRAME RULES Use classic white Polaroid border Bottom border slightly thicker (for optional text) Ensure: No distortion of original images No stylization applied to the photo content itself 🎨 GONGBI BORDER DECORATION (CRITICAL) Apply Gongbi painting style ONLY to the border: Style Characteristics: Fine, controlled brushwork High detail and realism Precise linework Layered, refined colors Content Rules: Decorations MUST be derived from: Elements in the photos OR User-provided context Examples: Flowers → same species in Gongbi style Birds → visually similar birds Objects → stylized but faithful ❌ No unrelated or imaginary elements 🎭 EMOTION-ADAPTIVE STYLING Adjust border artwork based on emotion + intensity: 🌸 Joy / Celebration Bright, saturated colors Dense decorative elements Slight outward flow of motifs Slightly expressive brushwork 🍂 Nostalgia Muted, softened tones Balanced spacing Gentle, reflective composition Timeless elegance ❤️ Love / Warmth Harmonious compositions Slight clustering for intimacy Soft color transitions Embracing flow around frame 🌿 Calm / Serenity Natural, restrained tones Minimal decorations Clean, breathable layout Focus on stillness 🌧️ Sadness / Melancholy Reduced color intensity Sparse decorations More negative space Subtle inward/downward flow ⚡ Chaos / Energy High detail density Layered compositions Strong color contrasts Controlled visual complexity 🎚️ Emotion Intensity Controls Intensity Effect Low Minimal decoration, soft tones Medium Balanced density and color High Rich detail, stronger flow, more saturation 🔤 TYPOGRAPHY RULES If user provides text: Place on bottom Polaroid border Preserve exact wording If no text: Do NOT add any text Max: One title only (if explicitly requested) 🚫 STRICT CONSTRAINTS Do NOT modify or stylize original photo content Do NOT hallucinate decorative elements Do NOT clutter beyond emotional intent Do NOT break Gongbi realism Do NOT obstruct key subjects Do NOT add extra captions or footnotes 🎯 FINAL OUTPUT FEEL A museum-quality fusion of: Clean, modern Polaroid photography Intricate, emotionally adaptive Gongbi artistry

name: Junk Journal
description: A collage-style mixed-media aesthetic with layered textures, vintage ephemera, torn paper edges, stamps, and handwritten notes. Nostalgic and tactile.
prompt: A structured story-agent block (emotion, captions, visual cues, style-specific notes) is provided with the request; prefer it for mood, on-image text, and composition when present. Create a hyper-realistic scrapbook-style memory page (vertical 9:16) using the provided user photos, summary, and emotion. The output should feel like a handmade, tactile scrapbook that tells a cohesive story and is visually share-worthy. 🧩 INPUTS Photos: [Insert user-uploaded images] Summary: [Insert AI-generated summary] Emotion: [Insert extracted emotion — e.g., nostalgia, joy, warmth, pride] 🖼️ STYLE & VISUAL LANGUAGE Emulate a handcrafted scrapbook aesthetic: Layered paper textures (kraft paper, patterned sheets, torn edges) Realistic shadows, depth, and slight imperfections (misalignment, tape edges) Stickers, tags, washi tapes, stamps, cut-outs, handwritten notes Style inspiration: Family memory albums Travel scrapbooks DIY journaling layouts The final output should feel like a photo of a real physical scrapbook page, not digital flat design 📐 LAYOUT (9:16 VERTICAL COMPOSITION) Use a balanced collage structure: 3–6 photos arranged organically (grid + overlap mix) One hero photo slightly larger to anchor the story Maintain natural spacing and layering: Slight overlaps, taped corners, pinned notes Margins consistent with a real scrapbook page Include: Title section (top or center) Supporting journaling blocks Decorative clusters around photos 📸 PHOTO HANDLING (CRITICAL) DO NOT alter user photos in any way No face edits, filters, color grading, or cropping that changes meaning Preserve: Original lighting, composition, and subjects Only apply: Physical-style framing (white borders, polaroid edges, taped corners) ✍️ TEXT & STORYTELLING Convert the summary into: A short title (3–6 words, emotionally resonant) A journaling paragraph (2–4 lines, natural and human) Ensure: Text is factually accurate to the summary Tone reflects the emotion input Text styles: Handwritten fonts for notes Typewriter or cut-out style for captions Optional elements: Dates, locations, small annotations (“this moment”, “we laughed here”) 🎭 EMOTION MAPPING (IMPORTANT) Translate the emotion into visual design: Nostalgia → muted tones, vintage paper, sepia accents Joy → bright colors, playful stickers, dynamic layout Calm → soft pastels, minimal clutter, clean spacing Adventure → maps, travel icons, bold layering 🧷 DECORATIVE ELEMENTS Include relevant, story-aligned embellishments: Travel → planes, tickets, maps Home/family → hearts, fabric textures, cozy tones Kids/memories → doodles, playful icons Nature → leaves, florals, earthy textures ⚠️ Ensure all elements match the story context — no random decorations. 💡 REALISM CONSTRAINTS Add: Soft shadows under photos and paper layers Slight warping or imperfect alignment Tape transparency and paper grain Avoid: Overly clean or perfectly aligned digital look Unrealistic lighting or floating elements 📱 OUTPUT REQUIREMENTS Aspect ratio: 9:16 (vertical) High resolution, suitable for: Instagram stories / reels WhatsApp sharing Composition should feel like: A captured photograph of a scrapbook page on a table ✅ QUALITY CHECK BEFORE OUTPUT ✔ All photos are unchanged ✔ Text matches summary and emotion ✔ Layout feels natural, not templated ✔ Visual elements support the story ✔ Overall output feels personal, real, and share-worthy.

name: Comic Strip
description: Bold comic book style with thick black outlines, halftone dot shading, dynamic panel layouts, speech bubbles, and vivid pop-art colours.
prompt: A structured story-agent block (emotion, captions, visual cues, style-specific notes) is provided with the request; prefer it for mood, on-image text, and composition when present. Transform the provided input image into a comic-style visual narrative panel that enhances storytelling while preserving emotional truth and factual integrity. 🧩 INPUTS Image: User-provided photos (max 10) Context Text: User-provided story/caption User Emotion: joy | nostalgia | love | calm | sadness | chaos | excitement | mixed Emotion Intensity: low | medium | high 🎭 STYLE & VISUAL LANGUAGE Render in a comic / graphic novel style, dynamically selected based on emotion: Joy / Excitement → Clean modern comic (bold lines, vibrant flat colors, energetic layout) Nostalgia → Indie / hand-drawn (grainy textures, soft imperfections) Love → Soft modern comic (rounded lines, gentle contrast) Calm → Minimal comic (clean lines, restrained detail) Sadness → Muted indie style (soft lines, low contrast, sparse detail) Chaos → Manga-inspired (dynamic angles, motion lines, exaggerated energy) ✏️ Visual Elements Use: Strong ink outlines Stylized lighting & shadows Optional halftone / screen tones Emotion-driven enhancements: Motion lines Speed blur Exaggerated expressions (only if aligned with context) 🎨 COLOR & EMOTION SYSTEM (CRITICAL) Adapt the entire color language based on emotion: 😊 Joy / Excitement Bright, saturated palette Warm tones (yellows, reds) High contrast, lively highlights 🍂 Nostalgia Warm, slightly faded tones Sepia-like softness or muted warmth Gentle contrast ❤️ Love Warm harmonious palette Soft reds, pinks, warm neutrals Smooth visual transitions 🌿 Calm Cool, balanced tones Greens, blues, soft neutrals Low contrast, breathable visuals 🌧️ Sadness Desaturated palette Blues, greys, muted tones Soft shadows, low visual intensity ⚡ Chaos / Energy High contrast, bold color clashes Dramatic lighting Strong blacks + bright highlights 🎚️ Emotion Intensity Controls Low: subtle color shifts, minimal effects Medium: noticeable tone and lighting changes High: dramatic palette, lighting, and contrast shifts 🧠 NARRATIVE ADAPTATION Convert into: panels to convey the story Ensure: Strong emotional arc across panels Logical visual flow 💬 Text Integration Use context text as: Speech bubbles (dialogue) Thought bubbles (internal voice) Caption boxes (scene/narration) 🪶 Text Style Rules Comic-style typography: Bold uppercase for emphasis Handwritten/comic feel Keep: speech bubbles per character caption per panels Tone must match emotion: Funny → punchy Nostalgic → reflective Dramatic → cinematic 🎯 COMPOSITION Focus on primary subject(s) Maintain recognizable likeness and key details Simplify background if needed Emotion-based composition shifts: EmotionComposition BehaviorJoySlightly dynamic, open framingNostalgiaCentered, memory-like framingLoveCloser framing, intimate spacingCalmSymmetrical, balancedSadnessMore negative spaceChaosTilted, dynamic, asymmetrical Optional: Panel borders / gutters Bleed effects for dramatic scenes ⚠️ GUARDRAILS (STRICT) 1. Identity & Realism Preserve facial likeness and key features No distortion beyond stylistic interpretation 2. Context Integrity Do NOT fabricate events beyond image/context No misleading narratives 3. Sensitivity Avoid stereotypes or harmful reinterpretations 4. Text Accuracy Dialogue must align with context No over-dramatization if tone is subtle 5. Clarity Over Style Readability > visual effects Avoid clutter 6. No Over-Editing No extra characters No major scene changes ✅ OUTPUT FORMAT High-resolution comic-style image Integrated speech bubbles + captions Clean, shareable (social media ready) ✨ Optional Enhancements Add subtle humor (if context allows) Comic SFX: “CLICK”, “WHOOSH”, “HAHA” Thematic borders aligned with story
